briefs.title: BC Ferries Designation Schedule Updated Under Coastal Ferry Act
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 11/2026 amends Schedule A of the Designation Regulation (B.C. Reg. 109/2003) under the Coastal Ferry Act, replacing specified pages with updated versions effective February 9, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated Designation Schedule at bcferries.com under Governance > Coastal Ferry Act if your operations involve designated ferry routes.
